name: Warpath Command Intel
description: Intel about command-level operations within the Warpath conflict of YC128, uncovered through high levels of activity in military activities. This intel is of great value to any of the four factions engaged in that conflict and can be traded for equipment at their Quartermaster Traders. Quartermaster Traders locations: Amarr: Amarr, Gergish, Tash-Murkon Prime, Nare, Mehatoor, Kor-Azor Prime. Caldari: New Caldari, Ikao, Onnamon, Malkalen. Gallente: Dodixie, Luminaire, Intaki, Faurent. Minmatar: Rens, Hek, Pator, Amo.
